bit_or_note: 11: Signal before transfer to Primary Source
5: Signal before transfer to Secondary Source
6: Operate to Time Delay Neutral (destination Secondary Source)
0 = Daily; 1 = Weekly; 2 = Bi Weekly; 3 = Monthly; 4 = First Week; 5 = Second Week; 6 = Third Week; 7 = Fourth Week
1-7 is day for weekly and 1st-4th week types; 1-14 for biweekly; Date (1-28) for monthly
